---
title: "M3.Ex1: RAG Agent"
format: html
---

## Task 1: RAG

Make RAG to have a Question-answering LLM on a dataset like:

- a playlist of YouTube videos (or one long)
- or a list of pdf/pptx presentations (or one long)
- ...etc

Example: [A practical use case: searchable meeting archives](https://docling-project.github.io/docling/usage/processing_audio_media/#a-practical-use-case-searchable-meeting-archives).

## Task 2: Vector Store

Goal: Replace the `InMemoryVectorStore` in the previous RAG Pipeline with ChromaDB instead.

Step 1. Make persistent [ChromaDB](https://docs.trychroma.com/docs/overview/introduction) vector store on disk.

Step 2. Ingest the documents into the vector store.

Step 3. Query the documents by embeddings to find similar ones.

Step 4. Verify the database is kept when you restart the program, and that they embedding are not re-computed again.

## Task 3: Embedding Visualization

Goal: use [this visualization notebook](../lessons/visualizations.ipynb) as a reference, to apply it on your dataset and see the clusters of texts.

Note: you don't have to signup to their cloud.
